nodes.name: Weekdays 07:00 IST
nodes.notes: 07:00 IST — after the 00:30 brief, before the 09:15 NSE open. Requires GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Asia/Kolkata on the n8n service; the n8n default is America/New_York, which would fire this mid-afternoon IST and drift twice a year with US daylight saving.

nodes.name: Gate: is the cache fresh?
nodes.notes: The article has no equivalent, because it re-fetches from a paid API every run and so cannot serve stale data. Reading a local cache is faster and free but CAN serve stale data silently — this gate is the price of that trade. Without it a market holiday or a failed ingest would produce a confident digest of Friday's prices labelled as today's.

nodes.name: Build + send digest
nodes.notes: Reads watchlist.csv, prices from market_cache + bhavcopy LMDB, classifies 🟢/🔴/⚪, emails via the pipeline's existing SMTP env. Retry is safe up to the send: generation is pure, and a failed SMTP login fails before any mail leaves.

parameters.command: =cd /Users/umashankar/market-pipeline/code/python_files && ./.venv/bin/python3 send_alert.py "watchlist digest blocked: {{ $json.stderr || 'cache stale — ingest.sh did not produce fresh data' }}"

nodes.name: ALERT (stale cache)
nodes.notes: Fires only on the gate's error branch. A silently-missing digest is indistinguishable from a quiet market; an alert is not.

nodes.name: Refresh recurring movers
nodes.notes: Rebuilds reports/recurring_movers.csv from the signal ledger (>=2 distinct signal dates AND >=+2% since first flagged; india_factor_panel excluded as a biased sampler) and promotes the top 25 new names into watchlist.csv as `signal` tier — existing rows never touched. Runs BEFORE the digest so today's recurring movers appear in the 07:00 email. onError continues: a movers failure must not block the digest itself.

nodes.name: Justified brief (send + sync)
nodes.notes: Builds + emails the evidence-first Justified Brief (backtest-best screen per market, evidence printed above each list) and adds today's picks to watchlist.csv as `justified` tier — rendered as its own table in the digest that follows. Runs AFTER recurring movers, BEFORE the digest, so the 07:00 digest always carries today's justified picks. onError continues: this mailer failing must not block the digest.
